creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello there,

Thank you for your PR.

Two quick questions first, though:

- Are you aware of ports/175859 [1] ?  It has almost the same patches,
and I am currently testing them.

- Are you member of mono@ or did you discuss the transfer of
maintainership with them?  Note that I have recommended the other
submitter to take my port and he did not express any objections so
far.

Cheers,
Gabor

[1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175859
